text: The system shall display all the products that can be configured.
The system shall allow the user to select the product to configure.
The system shall display all available components of the product to configure.
The system shall enable the user to add one or more components to the configuration.
The system shall notify the user about any conflict in the current configuration.
The system shall allow the user to update the configuration to resolve conflicts.
The system shall allow the user to confirm the completion of the current configuration.
The system shall display detailed information of the selected products.
The system shall provide browsing options to view product details.
The system shall display detailed product categorization to the user.
The system shall enable the user to enter search text on the screen.
The system shall enable the user to select multiple options on the screen to search.
The system shall display all matching products based on the search.
The system shall display exactly 10 matching results on the current screen.
The system shall enable the user to navigate between search results.
The system shall notify the user when no matching product is found.
The system shall allow the user to create a profile and set credentials.
The system shall authenticate user credentials to view the profile.
The system shall allow the user to update profile information.
The system shall display active and completed order history in the customer profile.
The system shall allow the user to select an order from the order history.
The system shall display detailed information about the selected order.
The system shall display most frequently searched items in the user profile.
The system shall allow the user to register for newsletters and surveys.
The system shall provide online help and FAQs for customer support.
The system shall display customer support contact numbers on the screen.
The system shall allow the user to enter a contact number for support personnel to call.
The system shall maintain customer email information as a required part of the profile.
The system shall send an order confirmation to the user through email.
The system shall display a detailed invoice for the current order upon confirmation.
The system shall allow the user to print the invoice.
The system shall provide a shopping cart facility during online purchase.
The system shall allow the user to add or remove products in the shopping cart.
The system shall display shipping options provided by the shipping department.
The system shall enable the user to select the shipping method during the payment process.
The system shall display shipping charges and tentative duration.
The system shall allow the user to enter order information for tracking.
The system shall display current tracking information about the order.
The system shall calculate and display tax information for the order.
The system shall display available payment methods for selection.
The system shall allow the user to cancel an order.
The system shall allow the user to change shipping and payment methods for eligible orders.
The system shall notify the user about any changes made to an order.
The system shall display product reviews and ratings when a product is selected.
The system shall enable the user to enter reviews and ratings.
The system shall display available financing options and notify the user about financing requests.
The system shall allow the user to view a detailed sitemap.
The system shall display and allow selection of available promotions and rewards.
The system shall allow the user to confirm a purchase and enter payment information.
The system shall provide a uniform look and feel across all web pages.
The system shall provide a digital image for each product in the catalog.
The system shall provide multi-language support.
The system shall store all databases on redundant computers with automatic switchover.
The system shall provide T3 internet access with 99.9999% availability via contractual agreement.
The system shall use secure sockets for all transactions containing confidential information.
The system shall automatically log out customers after a period of inactivity.
The system must not store user passwords or confidential information in cookies.
The system must encrypt back-end databases.
The system shall load the product in no longer than five minutes.
The system shall use HTTP protocol on Port 80 for internet communication.
The system shall communicate with an external Tax system to calculate tax.
The system shall communicate with a shipping system for tracking and updating methods.
